channel.title: BCD-watch: Changes Report (weekly)
channel.description: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Apr 27 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 20 April 2026 through Monday, 27 April 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +40, -0

Support increases (40)

API

  1. api ➞ CanvasRenderingContext2D ➞ lang
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ DocumentPictureInPicture ➞ requestWindow ➞ option_disallowReturnToOpener
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ GPURenderBundleEncoder ➞ setVertexBuffer ➞ unset_vertex_buffer
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ GPURenderPassEncoder ➞ setVertexBuffer ➞ unset_vertex_buffer
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInFragmentStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageBuffersInVertexStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInFragmentStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ GPUSupportedLimits ➞ maxStorageTexturesInVertexStage
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Navigator ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ OffscreenCanvasRenderingContext2D ➞ lang
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ Serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ Serial ➞ getPorts
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ Serial ➞ requestPort
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ SerialPort
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ close
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ connect_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ connected
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ disconnect_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ forget
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ getInfo
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ getSignals
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ open
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ readable
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ setSignals
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  25. api ➞ SerialPort ➞ writable
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  26. api ➞ WorkerNavigator ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ CSSContainerRule ➞ conditions
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  28. api ➞ LanguageModel
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  29. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ append
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  30. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ availability_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  31. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ clone
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  32. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextUsage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  33. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextWindow
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  34. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextoverflow_event
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  35. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ create_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  36. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ measureContextUsage
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  37. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ prompt
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  38. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ promptStreaming
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ position-anchor ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ iframe ➞ allow ➞ serial
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 44

Show all 44 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (16)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 17 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ FileSystemHandle ➞ move
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ input ➞ type_color ➞ list
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy ➞ blocked-destinations_script
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy-Report-Only
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. http ➞ headers ➞ Integrity-Policy-Report-Only ➞ blocked-destinations_script
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy-Report-Only
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ accent-color ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ color ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-color ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ outline-color ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ stop-color ➞ currentColor
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ types ➞ attr ➞ attr-name_accepts_namespaces
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. css ➞ types ➞ global_keywords ➞ revert-rule
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ getRealms ➞ type_parameter ➞ window
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (23)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 17 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ CSSContainerRule ➞ conditions
  2. api ➞ LanguageModel
  3. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ append
  4. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ availability_static
  5. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ clone
  6. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextUsage
  7. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextWindow
  8. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ contextoverflow_event
  9. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ create_static
  10. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ measureContextUsage
  11. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ prompt
  12. api ➞ LanguageModel ➞ promptStreaming

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ accent-color ➞ currentColor
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ color ➞ currentColor
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule ➞ currentColor
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ column-rule-color ➞ currentColor
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ outline-color ➞ currentColor
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ position-anchor ➞ normal
  7. css ➞ properties ➞ stop-color ➞ currentColor
  8. css ➞ types ➞ attr ➞ attr-name_accepts_namespaces
  9. css ➞ types ➞ global_keywords ➞ revert-rule

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy-Report-Only

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ getRealms ➞ type_parameter ➞ window

Removed entries (5)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 17 April 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ all ➞ revert-rule
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ font-family ➞ fangsong
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ font-family ➞ kai
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ font-family ➞ khmer-mul
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ font-family ➞ nastaliq
  • Previous report: Monday, 20 April 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.12 (Friday, 17 April 2026) and v7.3.13 (Friday, 24 April 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Apr 20 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 13 April 2026 through Monday, 20 April 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +9, -0

Support increases (9)

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range-end
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range-end ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range-start
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. css ➞ properties ➞ animation-range-start ➞ normal
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ light-dark ➞ image_value
    Added to Firefox,Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ script ➞ type ➞ importmap ➞ multiple_import_maps
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ getRealms ➞ type_parameter ➞ worker
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 28

Show all 28 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (19)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 10 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_bgra8unorm-storage
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_core-features-and-limits
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_depth-clip-control
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_depth32float-stencil8
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_float32-blendable
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_indirect-first-instance
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_rg11b10ufloat-renderable
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_shader-f16
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_texture-compression-astc
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_texture-compression-etc2
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_texture-formats-tier1
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ GPUSupportedFeatures ➞ feature_timestamp-query
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ HTMLTemplateElement ➞ shadowRootSlotAssignment
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ options_parameter ➞ types_property ➞ permissions-policy-violation
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ WGSLLanguageFeatures ➞ extension_texture_and_sampler_let
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ hanging-punctuation ➞ force-end
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ env ➞ preferred-text-scale
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ meta ➞ name ➞ text-scale
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ template ➞ shadowrootslotassignment
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (9)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 10 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ HTMLTemplateElement ➞ shadowRootSlotAssignment
  2. api ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ ReportingObserver ➞ options_parameter ➞ types_property ➞ permissions-policy-violation
  3. api ➞ WGSLLanguageFeatures ➞ extension_texture_and_sampler_let

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ hanging-punctuation ➞ force-end
  2. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ light-dark ➞ image_value
  3. css ➞ types ➞ env ➞ preferred-text-scale

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ meta ➞ name ➞ text-scale
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ template ➞ shadowrootslotassignment

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ script ➞ getRealms ➞ type_parameter ➞ worker

Removed entries (0)

No features were removed from bcd in this time period
  • Previous report: Monday, 13 April 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.11 (Friday, 10 April 2026) and v7.3.12 (Friday, 17 April 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Apr 13 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 6 April 2026 through Monday, 13 April 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +5, -0

Support increases (5)

API

  1. api ➞ Credential ➞ isConditionalMediationAvailable_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ PaymentRequest ➞ getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities_static
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ all ➞ revert-rule
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ text-decoration-skip-ink ➞ all
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ img ➞ sizes ➞ auto
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 29

Show all 29 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (14)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 3 April 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ define ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ whenDefined ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Document ➞ createAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Document ➞ createAttributeNS ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Element ➞ setAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ Element ➞ setAttributeNodeNS ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Element ➞ toggleAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ WGSLLanguageFeatures ➞ extension_subgroup_uniformity
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ container ➞ container-query_optional
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ cross-origin
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ referrer-policy
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ crash-reporting
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (15)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 3 April 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ define ➞ html_name_validity
  2. api ➞ CustomElementRegistry ➞ whenDefined ➞ html_name_validity
  3. api ➞ Document ➞ createAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
  4. api ➞ Document ➞ createAttributeNS ➞ html_name_validity
  5. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ html_name_validity
  6. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ html_name_validity
  7. api ➞ Element ➞ setAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
  8. api ➞ Element ➞ setAttributeNodeNS ➞ html_name_validity
  9. api ➞ Element ➞ toggleAttribute ➞ html_name_validity
  10. api ➞ PaymentRequest ➞ getSecurePaymentConfirmationCapabilities_static
  11. api ➞ WGSLLanguageFeatures ➞ extension_subgroup_uniformity

CSS

  1. css ➞ at-rules ➞ container ➞ container-query_optional
  2. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ cross-origin
  3. css ➞ types ➞ url ➞ referrer-policy

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Reporting-Endpoints ➞ crash-reporting

Removed entries (0)

No features were removed from bcd in this time period
  • Previous report: Monday, 6 April 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.10 (Friday, 3 April 2026) and v7.3.11 (Friday, 10 April 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Apr 06 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 30 March 2026 through Monday, 6 April 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +23, -0

Support increases (23)

API

  1. api ➞ CSSFontFaceRule ➞ style ➞ type_CSSFontFaceDescriptors
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Document ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ HTMLImageElement ➞ sizes ➞ auto
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ Origin ➞ Origin
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ Origin
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Origin ➞ from_static
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ Origin ➞ isSameOrigin
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ Origin ➞ isSameSite
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ Origin ➞ opaque
    Added to Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ PerformanceResourceTiming ➞ contentType
    Added to Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ customElementRegistry
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ ToggleEvent ➞ source
    Added to Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ video ➞ loading
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

MANIFESTS

  1. manifests ➞ webapp ➞ migrate_from
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. manifests ➞ webapp ➞ migrate_to
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ clientWindow_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ height_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ state_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ width_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ x_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ y_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 32

Show all 32 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (13)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 27 March 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ animate ➞ options_iterationComposite_parameter
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Request ➞ targetAddressSpace
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ Element ➞ attachShadow ➞ options_referenceTarget_parameter
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ HTMLTemplateElement ➞ shadowRootReferenceTarget
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_local-network
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_local-network-access
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_loopback-network
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_targetAddressSpace_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ fetch ➞ init_targetAddressSpace_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ all ➞ revert-rule
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ local-network
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ local-network-access
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ loopback-network
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (18)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 27 March 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ Element ➞ attachShadow ➞ options_referenceTarget_parameter
  2. api ➞ HTMLTemplateElement ➞ shadowRootReferenceTarget
  3. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_local-network
  4. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_local-network-access
  5. api ➞ Permissions ➞ permission_loopback-network
  6. api ➞ Request ➞ Request ➞ init_targetAddressSpace_parameter
  7. api ➞ fetch ➞ init_targetAddressSpace_parameter

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ video ➞ loading

HTTP

  1. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ local-network
  2. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ local-network-access
  3. http ➞ headers ➞ Permissions-Policy ➞ loopback-network

MANIFESTS

  1. manifests ➞ webapp ➞ migrate_from
  2. manifests ➞ webapp ➞ migrate_to

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ height_parameter
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ state_parameter
  3. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ width_parameter
  4. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ x_parameter
  5. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browser ➞ setClientWindowState ➞ y_parameter

Removed entries (1)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 27 March 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ video ➞ autoplay ➞ loading
  • Previous report: Monday, 30 March 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.9 (Friday, 27 March 2026) and v7.3.10 (Friday, 3 April 2026)

item.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Mar 30 2026
item.description: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
item.content:encoded:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 23 March 2026 through Monday, 30 March 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +56, -0

Support increases (56)

API

  1. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-display
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-family
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-feature-settings
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-stretch
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-style
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-weight
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontDisplay
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  9. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontFamily
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  10. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontFeatureSettings
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  11. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontStretch
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  12. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontStyle
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  13. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontWeight
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  14. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ size-adjust
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  15. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ sizeAdjust
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  16. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ src
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  17. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ unicode-range
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  18. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ unicodeRange
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  19. api ➞ Document ➞ ariaNotify
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  20. api ➞ Document ➞ caretRangeFromPoint
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  21. api ➞ Element ➞ ariaNotify
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  22. api ➞ HighlightRegistry ➞ highlightsFromPoint
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  23. api ➞ RTCError ➞ RTCError
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  24. api ➞ RTCError
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  25. api ➞ RTCError ➞ errorDetail
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  26. api ➞ RTCError ➞ receivedAlert
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  27. api ➞ RTCError ➞ sctpCauseCode
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  28. api ➞ RTCError ➞ sdpLineNumber
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  29. api ➞ RTCError ➞ sentAlert
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  30. api ➞ RTCErrorEvent ➞ RTCErrorEvent
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  31. api ➞ RTCErrorEvent
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  32. api ➞ RTCErrorEvent ➞ error
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  33. api ➞ RTCIceTransport ➞ role
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  34. api ➞ RTCPeerConnection ➞ icecandidateerror_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  35. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  36. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  37. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ address
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  38. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ errorCode
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  39. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ errorText
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  40. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ port
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  41. api ➞ RTCPeerConnectionIceErrorEvent ➞ url
    Added to Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  42. api ➞ VisualViewport ➞ scrollend_event
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  43. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ ascent-override
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  44. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ ascentOverride
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  45. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ descent-override
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  46. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ descentOverride
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  47. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-language-override
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  48. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-variation-settings
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  49. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontLanguageOverride
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  50. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontVariationSettings
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  51. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ line-gap-override
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  52. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ lineGapOverride
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  53. api ➞ HTMLMediaElement ➞ loading
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ all ➞ revert-rule
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ audio ➞ loading
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ video ➞ autoplay ➞ loading
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 32

Show all 32 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (9)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 20 March 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ options_parameter
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ CookieStore ➞ set ➞ maxAge_option
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ options_parameter ➞ customElementRegistry_option
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_is_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ options_parameter ➞ customElementRegistry_option
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_is_parameter
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ xywh
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ color-mix ➞ variadic_color_arguments
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

New entries (21)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 20 March 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

  1. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ ascent-override
  2. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ ascentOverride
  3. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ descent-override
  4. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ descentOverride
  5. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-language-override
  6. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ font-variation-settings
  7. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontLanguageOverride
  8. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ fontVariationSettings
  9. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ line-gap-override
  10. api ➞ CSSFontFaceDescriptors ➞ lineGapOverride
  11. api ➞ CookieStore ➞ set ➞ maxAge_option
  12. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ options_parameter ➞ customElementRegistry_option
  13. api ➞ Document ➞ createElement ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_is_parameter
  14. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ options_parameter ➞ customElementRegistry_option
  15. api ➞ Document ➞ createElementNS ➞ options_parameter ➞ options_is_parameter
  16. api ➞ HTMLMediaElement ➞ loading

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ all ➞ revert-rule
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ shape-outside ➞ xywh
  3. css ➞ types ➞ color ➞ color-mix ➞ variadic_color_arguments

HTML

  1. html ➞ elements ➞ audio ➞ loading
  2. html ➞ elements ➞ video ➞ autoplay ➞ loading

Removed entries (2)

The entries in this section were found in BCD on Friday, 20 March 2026, but are no longer present. The reasons for this removal can be anything from an experimental proposal that was never supported to a property or value being renamed to something else.

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ -webkit-margin-after
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ -webkit-margin-before
  • Previous report: Monday, 23 March 2026

BCD Watch: A service of

Subscribe: RSS • Atom • JSON

This report was generated by diffing v7.3.8 (Friday, 20 March 2026) and v7.3.9 (Friday, 27 March 2026)
